title: Connect Ollama to Cursor without setup pain — cursor-ollama
description: A friendly open-source tool for connecting local Ollama models to Cursor through a secure Cloudflare Tunnel, guided Windows wizard, tray controls, model aliases, and clear setup docs.
author: AsherQelich SayyedMuhammadi

openGraph.title: Connect Ollama to Cursor without setup pain
openGraph.description: Run local Ollama models in Cursor with a friendly wizard, secure tunnel, Bearer auth, model aliases, and tray controls. Free and open source.
